steps.title: Close the because clause
steps.content: The sentence begins with a dependent Because clause: regolith is readily available and high in oxygen content. That opening dependent clause must be followed by a comma before the main clause begins.

steps.title: Avoid adding a conjunction
steps.content: Choices A and D add and, which wrongly joins the dependent clause to the main clause. Choice C omits the comma needed after an introductory dependent clause. The blank should simply end the clause with a comma. The answer is B.
